query_normalized: bayesian nonparametrics for anomaly detection in time series statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the same dependent variable (anomaly/change detection) on the same domain (time series/sequential data), even though it uses a different methodology (CUSUM/frequentist vs. Bayesian Nonparametrics). For a literature review, this classical approach provides relevant context for the task and domain landscape.
